captions.caption: An empty airport runway stretches toward a hazy horizon under a pale sky.
A large four-engine aircraft appears in the distance, descending toward the runway.
The airplane continues its approach, becoming more distinct against the sky.
The aircraft lowers its landing gear as it nears the start of the runway.
The wheels of the airplane touch down on the dark asphalt of the runway.
A small cloud of smoke appears from the tires upon contact with the ground.
The airplane rolls down the runway with its engines visible from the rear.
The large aircraft continues its landing roll, moving further away from the camera.
The tail and wings of the airplane are seen as it slows down on the runway.
The aircraft maintains its path down the center of the runway.
The airplane begins to turn, showing the text UNITED STATES OF AMERICA on its side.
The aircraft taxis completely off the runway, leaving it empty once more.
A person wearing a red wingsuit stands on the edge of a high rocky cliff.
The camera looks down the steep mountain slope toward a large body of water.
The wingsuit flyer jumps off the cliff and begins to glide down the mountain.
The flyer passes close to the rocky terrain as they descend toward the valley.
The flyer glides over a dense green forest on the side of the mountain.
The camera shows the fjord and the surrounding mountains from above.
The flyer continues to descend over the forested slopes toward the water.
A white parachute opens above the flyer as they approach a road.
The person under the parachute glides past a waterfall on the rocky cliffside.
The camera view is obscured by white fabric as the flyer approaches the ground.
The person lands on a paved road and begins to gather their red and white parachute.
A brown bear climbs a tree and chews on a thin branch.
The bear uses its mouth to pull on a branch while perched in the tree.
The bear reaches for a higher branch with its teeth.
The bear adjusts its grip on the tree branches.
A second bear cub is visible resting on branches lower in the tree.
The bear sits on a branch and looks toward the ground.
The bear shifts its weight while holding onto the tree trunk.
Two bears climb on different branches with a river in the background.
The bears descend the tree trunk toward the ground.
A bear cub slides down a vertical tree trunk in a grassy enclosure.
Two bears stand at the base of the tree on the grass.
A bear walks across the green field away from the tree.
A small red goal sits on a concrete court next to a wooden wall with a sign.
A cyclist rides across the wide concrete surface under the night sky.
Several cyclists ride in circles on the court under bright stadium lights.
A person on a bicycle uses a long-handled mallet to strike a ball on the court.
The camera follows a cyclist as they pedal across the court from a low perspective.
A cyclist wearing a helmet and dark gear rides across the court holding a mallet.
A man on a bicycle rides past the camera with trees and bleachers in the background.
Multiple cyclists with mallets move around the court together.
A cyclist in a blue shirt rides toward the left while others congregate near a goal.
A cyclist rides away from the camera toward the far side of the fenced court.
A cyclist pedals across the court under the glow of a bright overhead light.
A camera looks through a narrow, jagged opening between two large rock walls.
The view remains fixed on the dark, tight passage between the rock formations.
A large bus slowly enters the far end of the narrow rock tunnel.
The front of the bus, labeled Stagecoach, inches forward through the tight gap.
The bus continues its slow progress, with its sides nearly touching the rock walls.
The bus, numbered 803, moves further into the narrowest part of the passage.
A high-angle shot shows the white roof of the bus squeezing between the rocks.
The bus driver navigates the vehicle through the extremely tight rock opening.
A person in an orange shirt walks on the road behind the emerging bus.
The bus clears the narrowest section and begins to exit the rock formation.
The bus, labeled Stagecoach West, drives away from the camera into an open area.
The bus continues down the road, passing a group of people standing near parked cars.
A green train travels across a road crossing while cars and people wait behind a barrier.
The crossing gate lifts and people begin to walk across the tracks as the train moves away.
A black car is stopped on the tracks with its front end against a raised metal plate.
Several men stand around the front of the black car and the raised metal barrier.
A man in a striped shirt walks past the camera as more people gather around the car.
A close-up view shows people's legs and the front wheel of the black car.
A man holds a long wooden board while standing near the front of the black sedan.
A group of people watches as the front of the car is positioned near a gap in the pavement.
The camera view is obscured by a person's purple clothing as they move in front of the lens.
An excavator bucket is lowered toward the front left tire of the black car.
The excavator bucket lifts the front of the black car while men stand nearby.
A man crouches near the front wheel of the car as the excavator bucket supports the vehicle's weight.
An aerial view of a city and a winding river is seen through the cockpit window.
The aircraft tilts to the side, showing industrial zones and residential areas below.
The plane flies over a wide river that cuts through the center of the city.
The cockpit's digital displays and control panels are illuminated.
Skyscrapers and urban buildings are visible from the side window of the plane.
A close-up shows the cockpit window frame and a small hook.
An airport with runways and terminal buildings appears in the distance.
A pilot's hand rests on the throttle lever in the center of the cockpit.
The aircraft passes over the airport terminal where several planes are parked.
Large buildings and parking lots near the airport are seen from a low altitude.
The plane approaches the runway, showing the landing strip through the front window.
The aircraft touches down on the runway, following the white center line.
A chef uses two spatulas to move small pieces of food on a large flat-top grill.
The chef chops and stirs the small pieces of food while asparagus and onions cook nearby.
The chef gathers the chopped food into a central pile using metal spatulas.
The chef flips several circular onion slices on the hot surface of the grill.
The chef stacks onion rings of decreasing size to create a conical shape.
The chef adjusts the position of the onion stack while other vegetables continue to cook.
The onion stack remains stationary in the middle of the grill as the chef reaches for a bottle.
The chef pours a clear liquid from a red squeeze bottle into the hollow center of the onion stack.
The chef holds a lighter near the onion stack to ignite the liquid inside.
The chef squeezes liquid from a red bottle into the onion stack, creating a large flame.
A plume of white smoke rises from the onion stack as the flame dies down.
The chef begins to disassemble the onion stack with a spatula.
A stone bridge with multiple arches spans across a river with red and green buoys.
The camera looks up at the dark iron lattice structure of the Eiffel Tower against a bright sky.
Intricate metal beams and decorative patterns of the tower are shown in a close-up upward shot.
Numerous people are visible walking and standing on an observation deck of the Eiffel Tower.
Bright yellow flowers and green foliage grow along the base of a light-colored stone wall.
The camera captures another angle of the tower's massive iron supports from underneath.
A direct upward view from the center of the base reveals the complex internal framework of the tower.
The entire Eiffel Tower stands tall against a clear, pale blue sky.
A large crowd of people is gathered on the ground near the base of the Eiffel Tower.
The view through the large arch of the tower shows distant buildings and a clear horizon.
A wide shot features the green lawn of the Champ de Mars leading up to the base of the tower.
The sun shines through the iron lattice of the tower, creating a bright lens flare.
An excavator stands near a bridge where a large group of people is gathered by the water.
People stand on a narrow path next to the excavator's large metal tracks.
A person sits inside the excavator's bucket as it moves over the water.
Several people are transported in the excavator's bucket toward a rocky shore.
The excavator bucket swings over the turbulent water while carrying passengers.
People stand on the side of the excavator's yellow body as it operates.
The excavator bucket dips low over the surface of the moving water.
Two men huddle together inside the excavator bucket during transport.
People with luggage stand on a concrete structure near the excavator.
The excavator bucket carries more people across the water.
A large crowd of people is seen on a narrow strip of land surrounded by water.
The excavator moves along the water's edge near the gathered crowd.
A spiral structure made of matchsticks with red tips stands on a white surface.
The matchstick tower remains stationary against a light gray background.
A hand moves a burning match toward the top of the matchstick tower.
The match heads at the top of the structure ignite and produce a large flame.
The fire travels downward along the outer edges of the matchstick spiral.
Intense orange flames surround the entire wooden structure.
The matchsticks turn black and begin to lose their original shape.
Smoke billows upward as the fire continues to burn the wood.
The structure collapses into a pile of charred remains.
The flames gradually die down, leaving behind blackened matchsticks.
Small embers glow among the pile of burnt matchsticks on the white surface.
The scene returns to the original unburnt matchstick structure.
A person in a red helmet sits at the top of a long yellow slide on a grassy hill while two others stand nearby.
The two people standing next to the slide pour liquid from buckets onto the yellow surface.
The person in the red helmet begins sliding down the long yellow track on the green hillside.
The slider gains speed as they move down the track toward a wooden ramp at the bottom.
The person launches off the wooden ramp and flies through the air against a bright sky.
The camera pans across the grassy field toward a small blue inflatable pool.
The person in the red helmet lands inside the blue inflatable pool on the hillside.
Several people run toward the pool to greet the person who just landed.
The person climbs out of the blue pool and removes their red helmet while others stand around.
The group of people gather together on the grass next to the pool, talking and moving around.
The individuals continue to interact and walk on the green slope near the landing area.
Three children stand on a grassy hill covered in fallen brown leaves.
The children sit together inside a large pile of dry leaves.
A boy and two girls run around a leaf pile and toss leaves into the air.
A boy in a dark sweater runs across the yard toward a red pickup truck.
The boy throws a handful of leaves into the air next to the parked truck.
A person wearing a dark coat walks across the concrete driveway.
A boy runs across the lawn while a person in a dark jacket walks toward a house.
The boy carries a large clump of leaves while walking past a red truck.
A boy in dark clothing runs across the driveway in front of a yellow house.
Three children gather around a leaf pile and jump into the center of it.
A girl in a blue shirt tosses leaves upward as other children play on the ground.
A boy bends over to gather more leaves from the ground into a pile.
Stone towers and gargoyles of the cathedral are shown against a grey sky.
Lit chandeliers line the dark interior nave leading toward stained glass windows.
People sit in pews under the high stone arches and pillars of the cathedral.
Exterior flying buttresses and ornate stone carvings are viewed from below.
An upward view shows the vaulted stone ceiling and columns inside the cathedral.
Yellow banners hang from the ceiling near a decorative metal gate.
Gothic towers and stone statues of the cathedral are captured from a low angle.
A high-angle shot shows the cathedral's roof and the surrounding city of Paris.
The tall spire of the cathedral is seen from above, overlooking the Seine River.
The cathedral's exterior is illuminated by the setting sun behind bare trees.
People walk across a bridge in front of the cathedral during a heavy snowfall.
The cathedral stands behind a stone wall and the Seine River in a snowy landscape.
Several people in red and black gear stand on a grassy field with large wooden reels.
A person in red gear moves behind a large wooden structure on the paintball field.
A blue crane stands in the background behind a warehouse and the paintball field.
The camera captures a wide view of the outdoor paintball arena with various obstacles.
A player in red walks past a large white cable reel on the green field.
The camera falls to the ground, showing a blurry close-up of grass and dirt.
The view remains obscured by a very close and blurry perspective of the grassy ground.
The camera stays low to the ground, capturing out-of-focus blades of grass.
A blurry view of the ground continues as the camera moves slightly through the grass.
The camera remains stationary on the ground, showing a blurry patch of earth and grass.
The screen flashes white before showing a metal braided hose and a person's feet on the grass.
A boy in blue swim trunks walks across a grassy yard toward a large inflatable slide.
Several children play in the water at the base of the blue and yellow inflatable slide.
A group of children climb up the center of the inflatable slide while others slide down the sides.
Children slide down the red and yellow lanes into the blue splash pool at the bottom.
Two boys climb the yellow steps of the inflatable structure as water sprays from the top.
A boy wearing a black shirt jumps from the slide into the shallow water pool.
A girl in an orange swimsuit climbs the inflatable slide while another child slides down next to her.
Multiple children slide down the various lanes of the inflatable structure at the same time.
A boy in dark shorts slides down the left side of the inflatable slide into the water.
Children continue to climb and slide on the large colorful inflatable in the backyard.
A boy in blue shorts walks away from the inflatable slide across the green lawn.
A close-up shows a boy with a skull-shaped temporary tattoo on his chest standing outside.
Waves roll onto a sandy beach with a mountain in the distance.
A pod of dolphins surfaces in the ocean near the shoreline.
The dolphins swim rapidly toward the beach, creating white foam.
A group of dolphins beaches themselves on the sand as people watch.
People run into the shallow water toward the stranded dolphins.
Individuals grab the dolphins by their tails to pull them back to sea.
A crowd of people works together to drag the dolphins into deeper water.
People continue to assist the dolphins through the incoming waves.
Several dolphins are successfully moved further out into the ocean.
The remaining dolphins are guided away from the shoreline by the group.
People stand in the surf and watch the dolphins swim away.
The ocean waves wash over the empty beach after the dolphins depart.
People stand on a sandy beach next to turquoise water under a clear blue sky.
A wide view of the calm, bright blue ocean extends to the horizon.
A small airplane appears as a distant speck in the clear sky above the water.
The airplane gradually increases in size as it flies toward the shore.
A large commercial jet with a blue and white livery approaches from the distance.
People on the beach hold up cameras and phones to capture the incoming aircraft.
The airplane descends lower toward the water with its landing gear extended.
The large jet flies directly over the turquoise water as it nears the beach.
A blue and white Boeing 747 flies at a very low altitude over the heads of people on the beach.
The aircraft crosses over the beach and prepares to touch down on the adjacent runway.
Seen through a perimeter fence, the airplane lands on the runway with mountains in the background.
Smoke rises from the tires as the large jet touches down on the airport tarmac.
Tourists walk along a waterfront promenade with a city skyline in the distance.
A woman stands on a lawn in front of a large stone wall.
The camera tilts upward to show the stone pedestal of the Statue of Liberty.
The Statue of Liberty stands tall against a clear blue sky.
A close-up view shows the detailed face and spiked crown of the statue.
The full figure of the Statue of Liberty is shown holding a torch and a tablet.
People walk along the top of the stone fortification at the base of the statue.
A large group of people walks past a display board on a sunny day.
Tourists lean against a railing to look out at the water and distant buildings.
A wide shot captures the massive stone base of the monument above a green lawn.
The camera focuses on the upper half of the Statue of Liberty against the sky.
A detailed close-up highlights the facial features and crown of the Statue of Liberty.
A cyclist waits at a starting line surrounded by spectators and a parked car.
The cyclist begins riding down a paved road lined with metal barriers.
The cyclist navigates a narrow, uneven alleyway between stone walls.
The cyclist rides down a flight of concrete stairs next to a metal railing.
The cyclist speeds through a narrow street with spectators behind blue barriers.
The cyclist passes several orange traffic cones on a wide paved street.
The cyclist's shadow is cast against a brick wall while riding down a narrow path.
The cyclist continues down a paved urban street with people watching from the sidewalk.
The cyclist rides along a sunlit road with a dirt slope on one side.
The cyclist passes a large red banner and rides through a section marked with ropes.
The cyclist maneuvers through a narrow passage lined with white metal fencing.
The cyclist enters a crowded finish area with many people and cameras.
A wide view of a flat, reddish-brown dirt field under a cloudy sky.
The camera captures the vast, empty landscape with a distant line of trees.
The horizon remains visible under a thick layer of grey clouds.
The camera lens is obscured, resulting in a blurry, tan-colored image.
The out-of-focus view continues with shifting shades of brown.
The camera is positioned low to the ground, showing the texture of the rocky soil.
A ground-level perspective looks out over the flat, barren terrain.
A dark SUV drives across the field away from the camera.
The vehicle continues moving toward the distant horizon.
The screen turns to a solid, blurry grey color.
The grey, out-of-focus image remains on the screen.
A person's foot in a sandal is visible against the rocky ground.
Several people stand on a large rock formation near a waterfall under a stone arch bridge.
A person stands on the edge of the stone bridge while others wait on the rocks below.
Two people in the foreground watch as others stand on the rock ledge above the water.
A person jumps from the rock ledge into the water near the waterfall.
Another person jumps from the rock ledge into the pool of water.
A person jumps from the rock ledge while two people watch from the water in the foreground.
A person jumps from the rock ledge into the water, creating a splash.
A person jumps from the rock ledge as several people swim in the water below.
A person jumps from the top of the stone arch bridge into the water.
A person surfaces and swims in the water after jumping from the bridge.
A man swims through the water toward the camera.
The man stands up in the shallow water and looks toward the camera.
A hand holds a small white ball near a black bird on a stone-paved patio.
The ball rolls on the ground as a German Shepherd lies in the background.
A black bird hops on the pavement toward the resting dog.
The German Shepherd holds the white ball in its mouth while the bird watches.
The small white ball rolls across the stone tiles away from the dog.
The black bird walks past a metal drying rack and a plastic pet carrier.
The bird spreads its wings and flies low over the patio area.
Two white buckets sit on the edge of the paved area near some greenery.
The German Shepherd lowers its head to sniff the white ball on the ground.
The black bird approaches the ball and nudges it with its beak.
The bird walks across the patio toward a white plastic chair.
The bird moves behind a large green water barrel and other outdoor equipment.
A scuba diver swims through the clear blue water above a large coral reef.
Two small yellow fish swim near the surface of the green coral.
The camera moves over a dense area of bumpy, light-colored coral formations.
A small spotted fish rests near a crevice in the white coral.
A diver swims in the distance over a wide expanse of the reef floor.
Various types of coral cover the seabed as the camera pans across the scene.
A close-up shot shows the detailed texture of a white coral structure.
Dark fish swim in and out of the shadows within the reef.
The camera continues to glide over the diverse underwater landscape.
A diver swims further away into the open water above the reef.
A black fish swims quickly over the rocky bottom of the ocean.
A diver's face mask and breathing apparatus are visible in a close-up shot.
